outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected - positive GEX regime across all expirations suppresses price movement. Dealers long gamma will pin price near max pain levels.
outlook.summary: Market positioned in positive gamma territory with strong dealer hedging effects. Multiple max pain levels (24950-25000) cluster near spot creating magnetic attraction. Major structural resistance at 26000 and support at 24000 span 4+ expirations. Bearish skew persists but positive GEX dampens downside volatility. Expect price stabilization around current levels with potential test of 25325 gamma flip.

levels.motivazione: Massive multi-expiry call concentration: 0DTE (282 OI), WEEKLY_1 (106 OI), WEEKLY_2 (335 OI), MONTHLY_1 (802 OI). Dealers short calls = sell hedging creates ceiling. Skew ratio confirms resistance strength.

Significant multi-expiry put concentration: 0DTE (155 OI), WEEKLY_1 (97 OI), WEEKLY_2 (296 OI), MONTHLY_2 (1674 OI). Structural floor with dealer delta hedging support. Bearish skew ratio 1.43 validates.
Max Pain confluence: WEEKLY_1 (25000), 0DTE (24950), WEEKLY_2 (24950), MONTHLY_1 (24900). All within 0.5% of spot. Positive GEX regime pins price here. Dealers maximize profit at this level.
0DTE gamma flip marks sentiment equilibrium. Spot below this level = dealers short gamma amplifying moves. Above = suppression mode. PCR 1.39 suggests bearish bias but positive GEX limits downside.
Multi-expiry put support: WEEKLY_1 (74 OI), WEEKLY_2 (94 OI), MONTHLY_1 (562 PUT + 1037 CALL). High IV put side (26.2%) indicates hedging demand. Secondary structural support zone.
Near-term call resistance: 0DTE (159 OI), WEEKLY_1 (136 OI). Positioned above gamma flip at 25325. Combined with 25350 OI creates friction zone. Volume spike 796 on 0DTE suggests active trading.
Near-spot put support: 0DTE (144 OI), MONTHLY_1 (378 OI). High volume 264 on 0DTE indicates active defense. First support below spot and max pain cluster.
MONTHLY_1 dominant call wall (1088 OI). Secondary resistance above 26000 resonance. Extended target if breakout occurs. Low IV (16.15%) suggests low break probability.
